title: Greek-Style Lamb Koftas with Keftedes
description: A flavorful and savory Greek dish featuring lamb koftas and crispy keftedes. This recipe is perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine lamb, Greek seasoning, onion, parsley, egg, flour, bread crumbs, salt, and pepper. Mix well with your hands until just combined.
Using your hands, shape lamb mixture into 8-10 keftedes. Thread each keftedes onto skewers.
Grill keftedes for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat about 1/4 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
When oil is hot, add keftedes breadcrumbs and fry until crispy and golden brown.
Serve keftedes hot with grilled lamb koftas and your favorite sides.
